productTitle: Ubiquiti Gigabit Power Adapter POE-24-12W White
name: Ubiquiti Gigabit Power Adapter POE-24-12W White
title: Ubiquiti Gigabit Power Adapter POE-24-12W White
short_description: Ubiquiti Gigabit Power Adapter POE-24-12W White from 15.05 USD. Worldwide delivery! Full description, specifications, reviews, extended warranty option.
description: The Ubiquiti POE-24-12W-G-WH is a high-efficiency Power over Ethernet (PoE) adapter designed to deliver stable power and data connectivity to Ubiquiti devices via a single Ethernet cable. This adapter is engineered to support Ubiquiti products requiring 24V passive PoE, making it a critical component for both indoor and outdoor network installations. This adapter operates with a universal input voltage range of 100-240V AC at 50/60 Hz, allowing it to be used with power systems worldwide. It converts the AC input into a steady 24V DC output at 0.5A, providing a total power output of 12W. This ensures that the connected devices receive consistent power necessary for their optimal operation. Designed to support high-speed data transmission, the adapter features two Gigabit Ethernet ports, allowing data rates of up to 1 Gbps. This capability is crucial for maintaining network performance, especially in environments where bandwidth-intensive applications are deployed. The dual Ethernet ports facilitate both power and data connectivity, streamlining the network setup and reducing the need for additional cabling. The construction of the POE-24-12W-G-WH is robust and durable, made from high-quality materials to withstand the rigors of everyday use and various environmental conditions. The adapter's compact form factor makes it easy to integrate into existing network setups, and its lightweight design simplifies handling during installation. Its white color provides a sleek and unobtrusive appearance, suitable for both residential and commercial environments. Moreover, safety is a paramount consideration in the design of the POE-24-12W-G-WH. The adapter includes integrated surge protection and overcurrent protection to guard against electrical anomalies such as power surges and spikes. These protective features help prevent damage to both the adapter and the connected Ubiquiti devices, ensuring reliable and safe operation. The device complies with international safety standards, providing an added layer of security and peace of mind. Electrostatic discharge (ESD) is the leading cause for outdoor device failures. You can effectively protect against ESD damage using a grounded Ubiquiti PoE Adapter, special cables and cable connectors. Installing the POE-24-12W-G-WH is straightforward and user-friendly, thanks to its plug-and-play design. Users need to connect the adapter to an AC power source and then link the Ethernet cable from the PoE port to the Ubiquiti device that requires power. The second Ethernet port connects to the network, enabling simultaneous power and data transmission through a single cable. This adapter is compatible with a wide range of Ubiquiti devices that support 24V passive PoE, making it a versatile solution for various network configurations.

detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti POE-24-12W-G-WH is a high-efficiency Power over Ethernet (PoE) adapter designed to deliver stable power and data connectivity to Ubiquiti devices via a single Ethernet cable. This adapter is engineered to support Ubiquiti products requiring 24V passive PoE, making it a critical component for both indoor and outdoor network installations. This adapter operates with a universal input voltage range of 100-240V AC at 50/60 Hz, allowing it to be used with power systems worldwide. It converts the AC input into a steady 24V DC output at 0.5A, providing a total power output of 12W. This ensures that the connected devices receive consistent power necessary for their optimal operation.

- Surge protection
- Clamping protection
- Maximum surge discharge
- Peak pulse current
- AC cable with earth ground

Designed to support high-speed data transmission, the adapter features two Gigabit Ethernet ports, allowing data rates of up to 1 Gbps. This capability is crucial for maintaining network performance, especially in environments where bandwidth-intensive applications are deployed. The dual Ethernet ports facilitate both power and data connectivity, streamlining the network setup and reducing the need for additional cabling.

detailed_description.heading: Safety and Protection
detailed_description.text: The construction of the POE-24-12W-G-WH is robust and durable, made from high-quality materials to withstand the rigors of everyday use and various environmental conditions. The adapter's compact form factor makes it easy to integrate into existing network setups, and its lightweight design simplifies handling during installation. Its white color provides a sleek and unobtrusive appearance, suitable for both residential and commercial environments. Moreover, safety is a paramount consideration in the design of the POE-24-12W-G-WH. The adapter includes integrated surge protection and overcurrent protection to guard against electrical anomalies such as power surges and spikes. These protective features help prevent damage to both the adapter and the connected Ubiquiti devices, ensuring reliable and safe operation. The device complies with international safety standards, providing an added layer of security and peace of mind.

Electrostatic discharge (ESD) is the leading cause for outdoor device failures. You can effectively protect against ESD damage using a grounded Ubiquiti PoE Adapter, special cables and cable connectors.

Users need to connect the adapter to an AC power source and then link the Ethernet cable from the PoE port to the Ubiquiti device that requires power. The second Ethernet port connects to the network, enabling simultaneous power and data transmission through a single cable. This adapter is compatible with a wide range of Ubiquiti devices that support 24V passive PoE, making it a versatile solution for various network configurations.
